zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware於1244年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷時，他的父親Walter Ridware39歲，母親Matilda Peche36歲。他於1270年1月與Elena FitzHerbert結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1284年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware于1244年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷时，他的父亲Walter Ridware39岁，母亲Matilda Peche36岁。他于1270年1月与Elena FitzHerbert结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1284年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware was born in 1244, in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Ridware, was 39 and his mother, Matilda Peche, was 36. He married Elena FitzHerbert in January 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1284, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware est né en 1244, à Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Ridware, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Matilda Peche, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elena FitzHerbert en janvier 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1284, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware(이)가 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 함스탤 리드워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Ridware(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Peche(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1270년 1월 Elena FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1284년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Ridware of Hampstall Ridware родился в 1244 г. в местности хамсталл ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Ridware было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Peche, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elena FitzHerbert январь 1270 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1284 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
